title: Enable incrementation/decrementation in array index
body:
I am trying to compile a SystemVerilog file that uses incrementation in array index. Currently when decrement/increment operator is used in the index, build ends with following error:

```
%Error: t/t_array_index_increment.v:13:41: syntax error, unexpected --, expecting TYPE-IDENTIFIER
      decrement_array_idx = TEST_STRING[--pos];
                                        ^~
%Error: t/t_array_index_increment.v:18:41: syntax error, unexpected ++, expecting TYPE-IDENTIFIER
      increment_array_idx = TEST_STRING[++pos];
                                        ^~

```
I have a branch which enables this feature in Verilator, I'll open a PR to resolve this issue.
